papers.title: Draft: LoRA-based PEFT for consumer GPUs
papers.abstract: We study parameter-efficient fine-tuning for large language models using low-rank adaptation. We target fast adaptation on consumer GPUs and analyze tradeoffs in rank, memory, and latency.

papers.title: Draft: Emergent abilities in few-shot prompting
papers.abstract: We investigate emergent behaviors in few-shot settings for GPT-3-like models, focusing on scaling, task clustering, and prompt sensitivity.
